name: RenderContent.ChangeContexts
summary: Context of a change to content parameters.

enum_values.name: UI
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of user activity in the content's UI.

enum_values.name: Drop
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of drag and drop.

enum_values.name: Program
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of internal program activity.

enum_values.name: Tree
enum_values.summary: Change occurred within the content tree (e.g., nodes reordered).

enum_values.name: Undo
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of an undo.

enum_values.name: RealTimeUI
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of 'real-time' user activity in the (content) UI. The content's preview, UI, group members and registerable properties are not updated.

enum_values.name: Script
enum_values.summary: Change occurred as a result of executing a script.
